# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Use `AGENTS.md` for maintainer workflows and project conventions.

When generating user BIT `.scad` designs, follow `docs/llm/BIT-DESIGN-GENERATION.md`. Use `docs/guidance/BIT-PARAMETERS.md` for exact v4 key names and `docs/llm/BIT-EXAMPLES-CATALOG.md` for the smallest relevant examples.
